name: Magician
description: AI-powered Figma plugin for generating icons, images, and copy from text prompts directly inside Figma. Created by Diagram and acquired by Figma in 2023 — features now part of Figma AI.

seo.title: Magician — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Magician: AI-powered Figma plugin for generating icons, images, and copy from text prompts directly inside Figma. Created by Diagram and acquired by Figma in 20

when_to_use: Icon generated from text prompt directly inside Figma canvas
AI-written microcopy dropped into button and label layers
Placeholder image generated to fill wireframe layouts quickly
Design explored with AI image generation before asset creation
Workflow replaced stock-photo search with Figma-native generation

pros: Pioneered generative AI inside Figma for icons and copy
Simple prompt-to-asset flow speeds up ideation
Acquired by Figma; features live on in Figma AI
Reduced friction of switching tools mid-design
cons: Original plugin effectively replaced by Figma AI
No longer a standalone product to evaluate
Output quality trails dedicated AI image tools
Future roadmap controlled by Figma, not independent
review.verdict: Historically important, but in 2026 you'd use Figma AI directly instead of the standalone Magician plugin.
review.best_for: Understanding the origin of Figma AI features or studying early AI design plugin UX.
review.not_for: New installs — use native Figma AI or Creatie instead.
